channel.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
channel.description:
So i was learning Frontity for a month on my spare time. I really enjoy it! As my learning process, i tried to porting my old project to the Frontity one. Here is the comparison between WP theme and Frontity: WP: https://eb2.demoapp.xyz/ Frontity: https://kebra.vercel.app/
If you guys interested, you can check the source here https://github.com/qbons/kebra I would really appreciate if someone can review my code and discuss the issue here.
Thanks

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: thewizardofwicacy
item.description:
Ok, yea that’s what I have been doing. was just wondering if there was an easier way. does give me an idea for a plugin, though.

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: qbonszone
item.description:
Aah sorry for the ambiguity, i mean i just using recreating the theme from HTML phase.

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: thewizardofwicacy
item.description:
When you say “port” the old theme, do you mean just recreating it? Is there some tool which makes it easier to convert the old theme?

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: qbonszone
item.description:
santoshdevnath15:

React Headroom

Yeah thanks. Well it’s client decision, not mine. Soo …

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: santoshdevnath15
item.description:
Hi @qbonszone the UI is looking good. It will be very good if you use React Headroom npm package to stick your header on scroll to top.

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package

item.title: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
item.dc:creator: qbonszone
item.description:
So i was learning Frontity for a month on my spare time. I really enjoy it! As my learning process, i tried to porting my old project to the Frontity one.
Here is the comparison between WP theme and Frontity:
WP: https://eb2.demoapp.xyz/
Frontity: https://kebra.vercel.app/

If you guys interested, you can check the source here GitHub - qbons/kebra
I would really appreciate if someone can review my code and discuss the issue here.

Thanks

Read full topic
item.source: Porting my old WordPress Theme to Frontity Package
